bridle 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Log a node visit

Source: R/decision_logger.R
log_visit.Rd

Appends one JSONL line to the log file. Increments turn_counter in place.

log_visit(
  logger,
  node_id,
  node_type,
  transition_trace,
  plugin_name = "unknown",
  plugin_version = "0.0.0",
  graph_version = "unknown",
  constraints_trace = NULL,
  knowledge_context = NULL,
  llm_output = NULL,
  user_response = NULL,
  decision_state = NULL,
  policy_applied = NULL
)

Arguments

logger

A DecisionLogger object.

node_id

Node identifier (character).

node_type

Node type (character).

transition_trace

Transition trace (list).

plugin_name

Plugin name (character).

plugin_version

Plugin version (character).

graph_version

Graph version hash (character).

constraints_trace

Optional constraint trace (list).

knowledge_context

Optional knowledge context (list).

llm_output

Optional LLM output (list).

user_response

Optional user response (list).

decision_state

Optional decision state (list).

policy_applied

Optional policy info (list).

Value

The updated DecisionLogger (invisibly), with incremented turn.

Contents
